option_line: gaDHO_visitElekHubSelA5b:"Glad to hear it. I expect more than 100,000 credits, plus hazard."
original: Glad to hear it. I expect more than 100,000 credits, plus hazard.
translated: Ravi de l'entendre. J'attends plus de 100 000 crédits, plus la prime de risque.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekHubSelA6a:"So it is Tri-Tachyon. They can afford at least 200,000 credits, plus hazard."
original: So it is Tri-Tachyon. They can afford at least 200,000 credits, plus hazard.
translated: C'est donc Tri-Tachyon. Ils peuvent se permettre au moins 200 000 crédits, plus la prime de risque.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekHubSelZGRa:"Glad to hear it. I expect more than 100,000 credits, plus hazard."
original: Glad to hear it. I expect more than 100,000 credits, plus hazard.
translated: Ravi de l'entendre. J'attends plus de 100 000 crédits, plus la prime de risque.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekHubSelZGRb:"Tri-Tachyon can afford at least 200,000 credits, plus hazard."
original: Tri-Tachyon can afford at least 200,000 credits, plus hazard.
translated: Tri-Tachyon peut se permettre au moins 200 000 crédits, plus la prime de risque.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAskPatron2a:"More noble, by far, is your willingness to take up this cause." (lie)
original: More noble, by far, is your willingness to take up this cause." (lie)
translated: Bien plus noble, de loin, est votre volonté de vous consacrer à cette cause." (mensonge)

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAskPatron3:Nod enthusiastically as if you are entranced by his words
original: Nod enthusiastically as if you are entranced by his words
translated: Hocher la tête avec enthousiasme comme si vous étiez captivé par ses paroles

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekHubSelC2b:"Aren't you a planetologist? This seems outside your field."
original: Aren't you a planetologist? This seems outside your field.
translated: N'êtes-vous pas planétologue ? Cela semble hors de votre domaine.
